channel.title: 2026-04-22 AI × Science 文献日报 RSS
channel.description: 2026-04-22 当天筛选出的 AI × 物理 / 化学 / 材料交叉文献 RSS。

item.title: d波交替磁性的原子尺度实空间可视化
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Daran Fu, Liu Yang, Yi Shen, Kebin Xiao, Yuyang Wang, Wei Jiang, Zhiwei Wang, Yugui Yao, Qi-Kun Xue, Wei Li
交替磁性作为区别于传统铁磁和反铁磁的新磁相，具有零净磁化但破缺时间反演对称性的特征。本工作利用扫描隧道显微镜，在CsV₂Se₂O中提供了交替磁性的原子尺度实空间证据：通过本征自旋缺陷探针，直接观测到单向电子图案和椭圆充电环等标志性对称性破缺特征，且相邻自旋缺陷线呈现相反自旋和长程反铁磁耦合，为从动量空间探测迈向实空间可视化开辟了新途径。

item.title: Hybrid between biologically and quantum-inspired many-body states
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Miha Srdinšek, Xavier Waintal
arXiv:2506.05050v2 Announce Type: replace Abstract: Deep neural networks can represent very different sorts of functions, including complex quantum many-body states. Tensor networks can also represent these states, have more structure and are easier to optimize. However, they can be prohibitively costly computationally in two or higher dimensions. Here, we propose a generalization of the perceptron -- the perceptrain -- which borrows features from the two different formalisms. We construct variational many-body ansatz from a simple network of perceptrains. The network can be thought of as a neural network with a few distinct features inherited from tensor networks. These include efficient local optimization akin to the density matrix renormalization algorithm, instead of optimizing all th…

item.title: A quantum turbuloscope: unlocking end-to-end quantum simulation of turbulence
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Zhaoyuan Meng, Xiao-Ming Zhang, Xiao Yuan, Yue Yang
arXiv:2508.05346v2 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: Multiscale organization is a hallmark of complex natural systems, spanning climate dynamics, biological morphogenesis, and fluid turbulence. While quantum computing promises exponential speedups for solving the evolution equations governing these fields, this potential is fundamentally hindered by the quantum state preparation bottleneck, the prohibitive cost of loading classical complex data into quantum states. Here, we overcome this barrier by introducing a physics-informed, three-stage geometric encoding method "turbuloscope", which efficiently generates complex turbulent fields. Rather than brute-force data loading, our approach acts as a kaleidoscope, leveraging the intrinsic structures of turbulence. We capture scale-invaria…

item.title: Competing Constraints on Superconductivity in Thick FeSe films
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Ya-Xun He, Xing-Jian Liu, Qun Wang, Ting Chen, Hassan Ali, Jia-Ying Zhang, Bao-Juan Kang, Zheng Zhang, Jun-Yi Ge
arXiv:2604.19443v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Superconducting films emerge from the complex interplay of multiple growth parameters, making their optimization challenging. In iron-based superconductors, compressive strain is known to enhance the transition temperature (Tc) of FeSe films, yet reported Tc values vary widely even on identical substrates, indicating factors beyond strain are critical. Here, we develop a high-throughput off-center pulsed laser deposition strategy that transforms plume inhomogeneity into combinatorial FeSe film libraries with continuous gradients in lattice parameter, composition, and disorder. We discover that the maximum Tc does not coincide with the plume center but can shift off-center, revealing a competition between favorable c-axis expansion, stoichiom…

item.title: Deep-Learning based surrogate models for plasma exhaust simulations -- SOLPS-NN
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Stefan Dasbach, Sebastijan Brezinsek, Yunfeng Liang, Dirk Reiser, Sven Wiesen
arXiv:2604.19223v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Accurate models of the scrape-off layer are required for the design and operation of tokamak fusion reactors. Scrape-off layer simulations are computationally expensive, difficult to operate and suffer from numerical instabilities. A potential remedy comes in using machine learning models trained on simulations for fast and easy to use predictions. We present a such candidate surrogate model - named SOLPS-NN - to provide recommendations for the methods to construct it. Based on a large dataset of several thousand SOLPS-ITER simulations with reduced neutral fidelity, a variation of machine learning models with differing architectures and scopes are tested. The evaluation shows that simple fully connected neural networks are a suitable archite…

item.title: Fine-Tuning Small Reasoning Models for Quantum Field Theory
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Nathaniel S. Woodward, Zhiqi Gao, Yurii Kvasiuk, Kendrick M. Smith, Frederic Sala, Moritz Münchmeyer
arXiv:2604.18936v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Despite the growing application of Large Language Models (LLMs) to theoretical physics, there is little academic exploration into how domain-specific physics reasoning ability develops while training these models. To investigate this, we perform the first academic fine-tuning study of small (7B-parameter) reasoning models dedicated specifically to theoretical physics. Because open-source verifiable training data required to train such capabilities is scarce, we developed a robust data generation pipeline that can both create synthetic problems and make existing human-authored problems suitable for model training. Selecting Quantum Field Theory (QFT) as our primary domain, we generated over 2,500 synthetic problems alongside a curated collect…

item.title: Large Scale Optimization of Disordered Hubbard Models through Tensor and Neural Networks
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Jacob R. Taylor, Sankar Das Sarma
arXiv:2604.18711v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: We theoretically demonstrate a practical method for tuning randomly disordered 2D quantum-dot grids underlying spin qubit platforms using vision-based neural networks trained on tensor-network generated charge-stability data. We show that a simulatable local 3× 3 window already contains sufficient information to tune the central dot within a much larger array, thereby validating a sliding-window approach in which one tunes a local region and then translates that window across the lattice to calibrate a larger device. This avoids the computationally intractable necessity for obtaining the ground states for large systems with exponentially large Hilbert space. For the experimentally relevant case where only the on-site disorder is unknown, the…

item.title: LatticeVision: Image to Image Networks for Modeling Non-Stationary Spatial Data
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Antony Sikorski, Michael Ivanitskiy, Nathan Lenssen, Douglas Nychka, Daniel McKenzie
arXiv:2505.09803v3 Announce Type: replace Abstract: In many applications, we wish to fit a parametric statistical model to a small ensemble of spatially distributed random variables ('fields'). However, parameter inference using maximum likelihood estimation (MLE) is computationally prohibitive, especially for large, non-stationary fields. Thus, many recent works train neural networks to estimate parameters given spatial fields as input, sidestepping MLE completely. In this work we focus on a popular class of parametric, spatially autoregressive (SAR) models. We make a simple yet impactful observation; because the SAR parameters can be arranged on a regular grid, both inputs (spatial fields) and outputs (model parameters) can be viewed as images. Using this insight, we demonstrate that im…

item.title: Lund Plane to Bloch (LP2B) Encoding for Object and Polarization Tagging with Quantum Jet Substructure
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Fabrizio Napolitano, Luca Della Penna, Tommaso Tedeschi, Livio Fanò
arXiv:2604.18613v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: The application of quantum algorithms to jet substructure analysis is of growing interest as NISQ hardware continues to mature in qubit count and gate depth. Jet substructure remains essential for addressing demanding and complementary challenges at the LHC and beyond, notably object classification and polarization tagging. However, existing quantum machine learning approaches typically rely on data representations that suffer from infrared and collinear unsafety, sensitivity to non-perturbative effects, or poor scalability. In this work, we introduce the Lund Plane to Bloch (LP2B) encoding, designed to map a theoretically clean and robust representation of jet kinematics directly into qubit states. Leveraging this encoding, we implement a…

item.title: 松弛的代价：凸神经网络验证误差的评估
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Merkouris Papamichail, Konstantinos Varsos, Giorgos Flouris, João Marques-Silva
本文研究神经网络验证中整数约束凸松弛带来的最坏情况发散。松弛空间形成格结构，顶部为全松弛（每个神经元线性化），底部为原始网络。作者给出全松弛与原始输出之间ℓ∞距离的分析上下界：该距离随网络深度指数增长，随输入半径线性增长；误分类概率随输入半径呈阶梯式行为。MNIST、Fashion MNIST和随机网络的实验支持了上述理论结果。

item.title: 拓扑神经网络的逻辑表达能力
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Amirreza Akbari, Amauri H. Souza, Vikas Garg
该工作研究拓扑神经网络（TNNs）的逻辑表达能力这一开放问题，以精确刻画其可表示的二元分类器。作者引入k-CCWL测试作为组合复形的高阶WL变体，并提出拓扑计数逻辑TCₖ，通过新颖的成对计数量词扩展标准计数逻辑，从同构测试角度分析TNNs的表达能力。

item.title: Towards Generalization of Graph Neural Networks for AC Optimal Power Flow
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Olayiwola Arowolo, Jochen L. Cremer
arXiv:2510.06860v2 Announce Type: replace Abstract: AC Optimal Power Flow (ACOPF) is computationally intensive for large-scale grids, often requiring prohibitive solution times with conventional solvers. Machine learning offers significant speedups, but existing models struggle with scalability and topology flexibility. To address these challenges, we propose a Hybrid Heterogeneous Message Passing Neural Network (HH-MPNN) that integrates a heterogeneous graph neural network (GNN) with a scalable transformer and physics-informed positional encodings. Our architecture explicitly models distinct power system components to capture local features while using global attention for long-range dependencies. Evaluated on diverse benchmarks, including PGLearn and GridFM-DataKit datasets, HH-MPNN ach…

item.title: Synthesis of discrete–continuous quantum circuits with multimodal diffusion models
item.description:
📚 Machine Learning: Science and Technology
👤 Florian Fürrutter, Zohim Chandani, Ikko Hamamura, Hans J Briegel and Gorka Muñoz-Gil
Efficiently compiling quantum operations remains a major bottleneck in scaling quantum computing. Today’s state-of-the-art methods achieve low compilation error by combining search algorithms with gradient-based parameter optimization, but they incur long runtimes and require multiple calls to quantum hardware or expensive classical simulations, making their scaling prohibitive. Recently, machine-learning models have emerged as an alternative, though they are currently restricted to discrete gate sets. Here, we introduce a multimodal denoising diffusion model that simultaneously generates a circuit’s structure and its continuous parameters for compiling a target unitary. It leverages two independent diffusion processes, one for discrete gate selection and one for parameter prediction. We…

item.title: Criticality-Enhanced Charging of Quantum Battery via Optimized Quantum Amplification
item.description:
📚 Preprints
👤 Jiawei Zhang, teng liu, Mingshen Li, Qing-Shou Tan, Mang Feng, Le Luo
Achieving rapid charging in quantum batteries requires the efficient harnessing of quantum resources, which is a task with great challenge experimentally. Here we propose and experimentally realize a quantum battery charging protocol that enables fast injection of substantial energy using a trapped-ion platform governed by the quantum Rabi model (QRM). The core of the protocol lies in the employment of the squeezing effect and the QRM criticality. Reinforcement learning further improves the charging performance by optimizing the preparation of the squeezed and anti-squeezed states and accelerating energy inflow near criticality. Experimental implementation with a single {}¹⁷¹Yb⁺ ion demonstrates the feasibility of the protocol, where the vibrational mode (i.e., quantized phonons) acts as…

item.title: Noise-resilient quantum reinforcement learning
item.description:
📚 Phys. Rev. Applied
👤 Jing-Ci Yue and Jun-Hong An
Author(s): Jing-Ci Yue and Jun-Hong An As a branch of quantum machine learning, quantum reinforcement learning (QRL) aims to solve complex sequential decision-making problems more efficiently and effectively than its classical counterpart by exploiting quantum resources. However, in the noisy intermediate-scale quantum (NISQ) era, its re… [Phys. Rev. Applied 25, 044060] Published Wed Apr 22, 2026

item.title: Accuracy and Efficiency Benchmarks of Pretrained Machine Learning Potentials for Molecular Simulations
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Peter Eastman, Evan Pretti, Thomas E. Markland
arXiv:2601.16331v2 Announce Type: replace Abstract: The rapid development of pretrained Machine Learning Interatomic Potentials (MLIPs) that cover a wide range of molecular species has made it challenging to select the best model for a given application. We benchmark 15 pretrained MLIPs, evaluating each one on accuracy, speed, memory use, and ability to produce stable simulations. This provides an objective basis for practitioners to select the most appropriate MLIP for their own simulations, and offers insight into which factors most strongly influence model accuracy. We find that the number of model parameters and the size of the training set are both strongly correlated with accuracy, but observe no benefit from including explicit Coulomb energy terms. Speed and memory use are determin…

item.title: Molecular deep learning at the edge of chemical space
item.description:
📚 Nature Machine Intelligence
👤 Derek van Tilborg, Luke Rossen, Francesca Grisoni
Nature Machine Intelligence, Published online: 22 April 2026; doi:10.1038/s42256-026-01216-w van Tilborg et al. introduce a deep learning model trained to simultaneously predict bioactivity and reconstruct molecules. The model provides a principled measure of distribution shifts, experimentally validated by discovering active inhibitors for two clinically relevant kinase targets.

item.title: 基于FPGA高能效一维卷积网络的日常家具振动手势识别
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Koki Shibata, Tianheng Ling, Chao Qian, Tomokazu Matsui, Hirohiko Suwa, Keiichi Yasumoto, Gregor Schiele
该工作提出在低功耗FPGA上部署紧凑神经网络实现日常家具振动手势识别的能效方案。关键优化包括：以原始波形输入替代复杂频谱预处理（输入尺寸缩减21倍）、设计轻量1D-CNN与1D-SepCNN架构（参数量从3.69亿降至216）、整数量化与自动化RTL生成实现无缝部署，乒乓缓冲机制进一步提升可部署性。

item.title: 面向机器学习检测的LLM生成混淆XSS载荷评估
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Divyesh Gabbireddy, Suman Saha
该工作构建结构化流程生成并评估大型语言模型产生的混淆跨站脚本（XSS）载荷，结合确定性变换技术与LLM生成，并通过浏览器运行时评估在受控执行环境中比较载荷行为。实验表明，未经调优的基线模型运行时行为匹配率为0.15，而在行为保持的源-目标混淆对上微调后匹配率显著提升。

item.title: Neural Operator Representation of Granular Micromechanics-based Failure Envelope
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Jinkyo Han, Payam Poorsolhjouy, Bahador Bahmani
arXiv:2604.19027v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Micromechanics-based granular models are widely used to predict the failure behavior of porous and particulate materials, including concrete, soils, foams, and biological tissues. Although these models offer considerable flexibility through microstructural parametrization and statistical representation, their mapping to macroscopic responses, particularly failure envelopes, is implicit and requires costly nonlinear, non-smooth simulations, where each failure point is obtained by following a loading trajectory. This limitation is further amplified in inverse settings, where one seeks microstructure configurations that reproduce a target failure response. In this work, we propose a differentiable neural operator that learns the mapping from mi…

item.title: Virtual boundary integral neural network for three-dimensional exterior acoustic problems
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Jiahao Li, Qiang Xi, Ilia Marchevskiy, Zhuojia Fu
arXiv:2604.18636v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: This paper presents a virtual boundary integral neural network (VBINN) for exterior acoustic problems in three dimensions. The method introduces a virtual boundary inside the scatterer or vibrating body and represents the associated source density with a neural network. Coupled with the acoustic fundamental solution, this representation satisfies the Sommerfeld radiation condition by construction and enables direct evaluation of the acoustic pressure and its normal derivative at arbitrary field points. Because the integration surface is separated from the physical boundary, the formulation avoids the singular and near singular kernel evaluations associated with coincident source and collocation points in conventional boundary integral lear…

item.title: A Vertical Conversation: How Explainable Deep Learning reveals stability-dependent information pathways in the Atmospheric Boundary Layer
item.description:
📚 Preprints
👤 John Keithley Difuntorum, Marwan Katurji, Jiawei Zhang, Peyman Zawar-Reza
The atmospheric boundary layer (ABL) is a turbulent “vertical conversation” that couples motions across height and time in strongly stability-dependent ways, yet most learning systems neither reveal nor exploit this structure. Here we test whether a deep learning (DL) model can recover these couplings directly from data and whether the resulting insight can guide model design. Using turbulence-resolving large-eddy simulations across neutral, weakly convective and convective regimes, we train a spatiotemporal DL model to predict near-surface windspeed from short sequences of horizontal windspeed at multiple heights. We interrogate trained networks with integrated gradients, temporal/spatial occlusion and region-of-interest attribution to map cones of influence that quantify how predictive…

item.title: 基于原子对统计的四方应变铁基合金磁晶各向异性分析：第一性原理与机器学习研究
item.description:
📚 ScienceDirect
该工作结合第一性原理计算与机器学习方法，从原子对统计角度分析四方应变铁基合金的磁晶各向异性，发表于Computational Materials Science。详情需查阅原文。

item.title: 机器学习加速非晶态锂离子电解质的发现
item.description:
📚 ScienceDirect
该工作围绕非晶态锂离子电解质的计算设计与机器学习加速筛选展开，发表于Computational Materials Science。详情需查阅原文。

item.title: Benchmarking Physics-Informed Neural Networks and Boundary Elements Methods for Wave Scattering
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Oscar Rincón-Cardeno, Gregorio Pérez Bernal, Silvana Montoya Noguera, Nicolás Guarín-Zapata
arXiv:2509.12483v4 Announce Type: replace Abstract: This study compares the Boundary Element Method (BEM) and Physics-Informed Neural Networks (PINNs) for solving the two-dimensional Helmholtz equation in wave scattering problems. The objective is to evaluate the performance of both methods under the same conditions. We solve the Helmholtz equation using BEM and PINNs for the same scattering problem. PINNs are trained by minimizing the residual of the governing equations and boundary conditions with their configuration determined through hyperparameter optimization, while BEM is applied using boundary discretization. Both methods are evaluated in terms of solution accuracy and computation time. We conducted numerical experiments by varying the number of boundary integration points for the…

item.title: Physics-Informed Neural Operators for Cardiac Electrophysiology
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Hannah Lydon, Milad Kazemi, Martin Bishop, Nicola Paoletti
arXiv:2511.08418v2 Announce Type: replace Abstract: Accurately simulating systems governed by PDEs, such as voltage fields in cardiac electrophysiology (EP) modelling, remains a significant modelling challenge. Traditional numerical solvers are computationally expensive and sensitive to discretisation, while canonical deep learning methods are data-hungry and struggle with chaotic dynamics and long-term predictions. Physics-Informed Neural Networks (PINNs) mitigate some of these issues by incorporating physical constraints in the learning process, yet they remain limited by mesh resolution and long-term predictive stability. In this work, we propose a Physics-Informed Neural Operator (PINO) approach to solve PDE problems in cardiac EP. Unlike PINNs, PINO models learn mappings between func…

item.title: Scalable Data-Driven Basis Selection for Linear Machine Learning Interatomic Potentials
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Tina Torabi, Matthias Militzer, Michael P. Friedlander, Christoph Ortner
arXiv:2504.16418v2 Announce Type: replace Abstract: Machine learning interatomic potentials (MLIPs) provide an effective approach for accurately and efficiently modeling atomic interactions, expanding the capabilities of atomistic simulations to complex systems. However, a priori feature selection leads to high complexity, which can be detrimental to both computational cost and generalization, resulting in a need for hyperparameter tuning. We demonstrate the benefits of active set algorithms for automated data-driven feature selection. The proposed methods are implemented within the Atomic Cluster Expansion (ACE) framework. Computational tests conducted on a variety of benchmark datasets indicate that sparse ACE models consistently enhance computational efficiency, generalization accuracy…

item.title: Machine Learning-Assisted Design Acceleration Framework for Energy Absorbing Re-entrant Honeycomb Auxetic Structures
item.description:
📚 Preprints
👤 Geonho Choi, Donyhyun Lee, Minyoung Kim, Jungwook Choi
The demand for lightweight energy-absorbing structures has rapidly increased. Auxetic structures, such as re-entrant honeycombs, exhibit negative Poisson’s ratio behavior and high impact stability; however, their compressive response is highly nonlinear and sensitive to geometric parameters, making them computationally expensive and design inefficient. In this study, we present an end-to-end machine learning design acceleration framework for a quasi-2D re-entrant honeycomb that integrates PyAnsys Geometry and PyMechanical. The proposed framework employs automated geometry generation and finite element analysis (FEA) to build a dataset (n = 40) forinterpretable surrogate modeling and covariance matrix adaptation evolution strategy optimization. Experimental validation was conducted using p…

item.title: Advancing Practical Quantum Embedding Simulations via Operator Commutativity Based State Preparation for Complex Chemical Systems
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Dibyendu Mondal, Ashish Kumar Patra, Rahul Maitra
arXiv:2604.19470v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Determining the exponentially scaled ground state wavefunction and the associated molecular properties remains one of the central challenges in quantum chemistry. Hybrid quantum-classical algorithms implemented on quantum computers offer a promising route toward addressing this problem. However, despite several successful demonstrations on small molecular systems, accurate simulations of large and chemically realistic molecules remain difficult due to the limited capability of noisy intermediate scale quantum (NISQ) hardware. To bypass the limitations of NISQ devices, while simultaneously retaining the accuracy of the ground state energy estimations, we propose a dynamic ansatz construction strategy based on operator commutativity and ener…

item.title: An Oracle-Free Quantum Algorithm for Nonadiabatic Quantum Molecular Dynamics
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Joshua Courtney
arXiv:2604.19319v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Quantum computation is an attractive front for many problems that are intractable for computers today. One such problem is nonadiabatic quantum molecular dynamics, where quantized internal states coupling to parameterized modes result in a Hamiltonian resistant to oracle-based models and spectral decomposition. This dissertation applies diabatic Hamiltonian operators directly to the computational basis as first-quantized split-operator propagators, validated with dynamic observables including absorption and recurrence spectra, scattering cross-sections, population dynamics, and quantum scars. Circuits are derived and specified, with focused circuit optimization in multi-mode and multi-channel extensions, including multivariate potential en…

item.title: 量子霍尔双层中激子的任意子超流性
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Zhaoyu Han, Taige Wang, Zhihuan Dong, Michael P. Zaletel, Ashvin Vishwanath
该工作探讨了量子霍尔双层中有限密度激子具有分数统计时产生的"任意子激子超流性"——即任意子超导性的电中性类比。在两个ν=1/3 Laughlin态的平衡双层中，最小层间激子携带任意子交换统计，其有限密度可产生与特定体拓扑序和边缘谱缝合的激子超流。该超流性在直接向Halperin (112)态转变附近以及双层Jain序列总填充ν_T=2×n/(2n+1)的类似转变处最为稳健，这些拓扑转变可用Chern-Simons QED₃描述。

item.title: 偶极-八极自旋冰的经典对称性富集拓扑序与不同单极电荷
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Pengwei Zhao, Gang v. Chen
该工作论证了基于偶极-八极双重态的烧绿石自旋冰材料中，偶极自旋液体与八极自旋液体可通过经典自旋冰机制下磁单极的磁荷加以区分。长程偶极-偶极相互作用使偶极自旋冰的磁单极通过哑铃图像获得有限磁荷，而八极自旋冰在经典机制下预期为零磁荷。该研究预期这一决定性观测可解决Ce₂Sn₂O₇本质的争论，并更广泛地启发Ce-烧绿石自旋液体、Nd-烧绿石反铁磁体、Er基尖晶石及各类对称性富集拓扑相中涌现准粒子 distinct 性质的进一步实验与思考。

item.title: 亚铁磁石榴石中畴壁脱钉的相干微波驱动
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Hanchen Wang, Laura van Schie, Adam Erickson, Lauren J. Riddiford, Davit Petrosyan, Christian L. Degen, Richard Schlitz, William Legrand, Pietro Gambardella
该工作展示了微波场驱动下钉扎在亚铁磁石榴石薄膜中畴壁的线性和非线性动力学共振激发。利用扫描氮空位磁测量术和非局域自旋泵浦测量，识别出源自畴壁在Pt条带定义钉扎线两侧局域振荡运动的磁子能隙内低频模式。微波驱动进入非线性 regime 时，该模式可在降低的外磁场下实现畴壁脱钉。微磁模拟揭示了随驱动功率增加，从局域振荡到钉扎位点间部分再定位、最终完全逃逸钉扎区域的演化过程，建立了通过局域非线性动力学操控磁织构的机制。

item.title: 磁性拓扑绝缘体中的集体激发与轴子暗物质探测
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Koji Ishiwata, Kentaro Nomura
本工作研究磁性拓扑绝缘体中的集体激发及其对轴子探测的影响。在含Hubbard项的三维拓扑绝缘体模型中，通过动力学磁化率公式化反铁磁态和铁磁态下磁振子与振幅模的有效作用，其中一个振幅模被识别为"轴子型"准粒子。其与电磁场的有效耦合相比此前估计基本不变或被抑制多达两个数量级，这可能显著改变利用磁性拓扑绝缘体进行轴子搜寻的灵敏度。

item.title: SU(N) Hubbard模型中渐近量子多体疤痕态的构造
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Daiki Hashimoto, Masaya Kunimi, Tetsuro Nikuni
本工作在一维SU(N) Hubbard链（N≥3）中构造渐近量子多体疤痕态（AQMBS），通过将疤痕子空间嵌入辅助Hilbert子空间H_P并识别父哈密顿量，将受限谱生成代数推广至多梯子情形。与此前方案不同，父哈密顿量对应SU(N)铁磁海森堡模型而非自旋-1/2情形，其无能隙磁振子实现原始模型的显式AQMBS；在双空穴-空穴子空间中导出了映射关系，证明了一磁振子色散、正交性、热力学极限下能量方差消失及次体积纠缠熵等性质。

item.title: 生长调控量子材料：过渡金属硫族化合物的热力学、动力学与缺陷工程
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Anzar Ali, Md Ezaz Hasan Khan, Mahmoud Abdel-Hafiez
该综述建立统一的热力学与动力学框架，将过渡金属硫族化合物的生长条件与相稳定性、缺陷能量学和微观结构相联系。研究考察化学势约束如何定义稳定窗口，过饱和与质量输运 regime 如何控制成核与形貌，以及非平衡路径如何实现动力学捕获和多型选择。涵盖块体和薄膜合成方法（化学气相输运、助熔剂生长、物理气相输运、溶剂辅助结晶、化学气相沉积等），强调晶体生长不仅是制备步骤，更是建立化学势、缺陷布居、多型稳定性和亚稳相可及性的热力学边界条件。

item.title: 囚禁离子量子计算机上的数字量子磁性模拟
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Reza Haghshenas, Eli Chertkov, Michael Mills, Wilhelm Kadow, Sheng-Hsuan Lin, Yi-Hsiang Chen, Chris Cade, Ido Niesen, Tomislav Begušić, Manuel S. Rudolph, Cristina Cirstoiu, Kevin Hemery, Conor Mc Keever, Michael Lubasch, Etienne Granet, Charles H. Baldwin, John P. Bartolotta, Matthew Bohn, Justin J. Burau, Julia Cline, Matthew DeCross, Joan M. Dreiling, Cameron Foltz, David Francois, John P. Gaebler, Christopher N. Gilbreth, Johnnie Gray, Dan Gresh, Alex Hall, Aaron Hankin, Azure Hansen, Nathan Hewitt, Craig A. Holliman, Ross B. Hutson, Mohsin Iqbal, Nikhil Kotibhaskar, Elliot Lehman, Dominic Lucchetti, Ivaylo S. Madjarov, Karl Mayer, Alistair R. Milne, Steven A. Moses, Brian Neyenhuis, Gunhee Park, Abigail R. Perry, Boris Ponsioen, Michael Schecter, Peter E. Siegfried, David T. Stephen, Bruce G. Tiemann, Maxwell D. Urmey, James Walker, Andrew C. Potter, David Hayes, Garnet Kin-Lic Chan, Frank Pollmann, Michael Knap, Henrik Dreyer, Michael Foss-Feig
本工作利用Quantinuum H2量子计算机模拟量子Ising模型的数字化动力学，通过充分抑制数字化误差，在严重挑战经典模拟方法的时间尺度上观测到热化现象。非均匀态的弛豫揭示了由近似能量守恒导致的涌现流体力学行为，并计算了相应的扩散常数。通过将模拟重编程至具有周期边界的三角晶格，该工作展示了数字量子物质在探索平衡系统复杂行为方面的潜力，涵盖从热化微观起源到具有奇异涌现性质的有效模型的稳定化。

item.title: 非共线磁体动力学磁化率：新型KKR第一性原理方案及其应用
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 David Eilmsteiner, Arthur Ernst, Paweł A. Buczek
本工作发展了基于Korringa-Kohn-Rostoker格林函数方法的线性响应含时密度泛函理论新实现，用于处理非共线磁体中的自旋激发。在绝热局域自旋密度近似框架下，详细讨论了非共线 susceptibility 计算中Goldstone模式的形成及其数值收敛行为。将该方案应用于交替磁性非共线kagome反铁磁体Mn₃Ir，研究了磁振子色散与Landau阻尼，发现阻尼对磁振子频率的非单调依赖使大动量激发在太赫兹自旋电子学中具有应用潜力，并分析了磁模式的实时实空间动力学及其强手性依赖的衰减特性。

item.title: FeₓNbS₂中脆弱反铁磁性的电子起源
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Wenxin Li, Jonathan T. Reichanadter, Shan Wu, Ji Seop Oh, Rourav Basak, Shannon C. Haley, Siqi Wang, Joshua E. Chaparro Mata, Elio Vescovo, Donghui Lu, Makoto Hashimoto, Christoph Klewe, Suchismita Sarker, Jessica L. McChesney, Alex Frañó, James G. Analytis, Robert J. Birgeneau, Jeffrey B. Neaton, Yu He
该工作结合角分辨光电子能谱(ARPES)和密度泛函理论(DFT)计算，揭示了插层过渡金属硫化物FeₓNbS₂在临界掺杂x_c=1/3附近发生的eV尺度电子结构重组。Fe 3dz²电子在费米面200 meV内形成窄带，与其他过渡金属插层TMD磁体显著不同；这些态与TMD层中巡游电子强杂化，在x_c以上因关联效应迅速失去相干性。这种准粒子退相干突然崩溃导致Fe-Nb杂化消失，明确抑制了面外有效Fe-Fe交换相互作用，驱动磁基态从反铁磁条纹相转变为zigzag相。

item.title: 笼目反铁磁体的能量景观：多能量尺度的表征
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Brandon B. Le, Seung-Hun Lee, Gia-Wei Chern
该研究探究了笼目海森堡反铁磁体共面基态流形内的能量景观。尽管共面态在谐波阶简并，态之间跃迁需要集体风向标环旋转，其势垒随环尺寸强烈增长。通过精确枚举和minimax势垒计算（小晶格）以及基于构型空间随机行走的统计构造（大晶格，以环长度作为势垒高度的代理），研究揭示了与基本六自旋环相关的低势垒主导尺度，以及更长重排导致的高势垒区域；大系统的统计分析进一步暴露了包括显著六自旋环峰和中间无标度环长度区域的势垒尺度层级，为多重动力学时间尺度提供了自然基础。

item.title: 通过色氨酸网络模拟与紫外光谱工程化微管量子光学响应
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Lea Gassab, Travis J. A. Craddock
该工作评估了通过调控微管紫外吸收芳香网络来调谐其荧光特性的可行性，结合了激子辐射耦合模型、分子动力学衍生的微管类组装体以及微孔板几何中的稳态吸收和荧光测量。模拟量化了位置和取向涨落如何重塑辐射速率和量子产率，并预测了通过移除特定位点、在候选结合口袋添加额外色氨酸或使用混合修饰分数来扰动色氨酸网络对发射的调制。猪脑微管蛋白二聚体和紫杉醇稳定微管实验支持这些趋势：聚合作用增强280 nm处量子产率，而添加L-色氨酸可重复猝灭两个波长的微管荧光。

item.title: 各向异性光场调控d波交替磁体的非平庸能带结构与自旋极化
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Andrii Iurov, Liubov Zhemchuzhna, Tiyhearah Danner-Jackson
本工作理论研究了非共振光缀饰场下d波交替磁体的能谱、能隙、拓扑与集体性质及线性响应，涵盖dₓ²₋y²和dₓy两种配对对称性。在线偏振辐照下发现有限能隙的打开——这一现象在Dirac材料中未观察到；部分关键性质需在二阶微扰展开中才能揭示。各向异性驱动场导致交替磁体Edelstein磁化率的微妙变化，可实现自旋极化的精细调控。该工作还计算了多种交替磁体的Berry曲率，为光控量子材料设计提供了理论基础。

item.title: CeIrIn₅中场致反铁磁相变
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Y. Tokunaga, M. -T. Suzuki, S. Krämer, H. Sakai, S. Kambe, H. Harima, D. Aoki, M. Horvatić, I. Sheikin
该研究通过¹¹⁵In核磁共振(NMR)研究重费米子化合物CeIrIn₅在近c轴高磁场下的低温行为。约28 T处场致转变表现为NMR线强度骤降（T₂急剧缩短）及1/T₁显著峰，结合de Haas-van Alphen与能带计算，最自然地解释为Q=(1/2,1/2,0)反铁磁态，磁矩沿c轴反平行排列——这是磁场沿排列方向诱导反铁磁有序的独特案例。

item.title: 混合原子系统中自旋-自旋相互作用的Floquet工程
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Daniel Gavilan-Martin, Grzegorz Łukasiewicz, Vincent Schäfer, Mikhail Padniuk, Adam Stefański, Adam Wkeglik, Emmanuel Klinger, Szymon Pustelny, Derek F. Jackson Kimball, Dmitry Budker, Arne Wickenbrock
该工作展示了通过参量调制对混合自旋系统中以费米接触相互作用为主导的有效自旋-自旋相互作用进行动力学控制。在碱金属-惰性气体共磁强计中，电子自旋极化方向相对于核自旋极化的周期性调制导致自旋交换耦合的Floquet诱导重整化，由零阶贝塞尔函数支配。该效应实现了在不改变系统本征性质的情况下连续调谐和抑制有效相互作用强度，为精密测量和量子存储提供了新机遇。

item.title: Hatsugai-Kohmoto-like Models for Altermagnets and Odd-Parity Magnets
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Konstantin Rickelt, Denis Sedov, Mathias S. Scheurer
arXiv:2604.18684v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: We introduce a generalized Hatsugai-Kohmoto multi-orbital model and study its phase diagram and physical properties in the additional presence of perturbations that lift any extensive ground-state degeneracies. The unperturbed, exactly solvable model already displays a rich set of spectral functions, including regimes reminiscent of unconventional magnets. We map the first-order study of additional spatially local multi-orbital Hubbard interactions to a Heisenberg model in momentum space, which leads to symmetry-breaking instabilities already at weak coupling. Interestingly, translational-symmetry breaking orders, such as antiferromagnetism, are excluded. Instead, in addition to ferromagnetism, unconventional p-wave and d-wave magnets occur,…

item.title: 二维石墨烯超晶格中的本征i波交错磁性
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Cuiju Yu, Jose L. Lado
该工作建立了在石墨烯反点超晶格中工程化i波交错磁性的对称性指导设计原则，并在特定单层及双层石墨烯超晶格中展示了交错磁态的出现。结合第一性原理方法与原子紧束缚模型，研究揭示了相互作用诱导的i波交错磁性劈裂，其源于二维石墨烯反点超晶格的本征磁不稳定性。该研究为在石墨烯平台中工程化i波交错磁性确立了策略，提出了基于碳的交错磁性自旋电子学平台。

item.title: Logarithmic Entanglement and Emergent Dipole Symmetry from a Strongly Coupled Light-Matter Quantum Circuit
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Luiz H. Santos
arXiv:2604.18670v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Hybrid systems where a quantum material strongly couples to a nonlocal cavity photon mode have emerged as a new frontier for controlling and probing quantum correlations, yet the structure and scaling of light-matter entanglement produced by the nonlocal coupling remains poorly understood. We address this problem through an exactly solvable framework based on reinterpreting the Power--Zienau--Woolley (PZW) transformation as a light-matter quantum circuit that couples the photonic position quadrature X sim a + a^dagger to the many-body dipole P of a one-dimensional quantum chain. We derive a closed-form expression for the reduced density matrix valid at all coupling strengths, in which off-diagonal elements between matter states of unequal di…

item.title: 分子中核运动与核自旋的磁耦合
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Matthias Diez, Johannes K. Krondorfer, Albert Hirtenfelder, Andreas W. Hauser
该工作发展了描述分子系统中核运动与核自旋之间磁偶极耦合的通用理论框架，该框架基于现代电子结构理论并受电子相互作用Breit-Pauli哈密顿量的启发，区分了核自旋-轨道和自旋-其他-轨道贡献。研究表明，核自旋与高度对称分子赝转动激发的相互作用可能导致NMR光谱中由红外光触发的、实验可观测的超精细分裂，为振动诱导的核自旋效应提供了系统描述。

item.title: 坡印廷定理、麦克斯韦方程组、狄拉克方程与量子电动力学中的磁矩
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Peter J Mohr
本文研究经典与量子电动力学中电子磁偶极矩与磁场或其他电子相互作用的理论。作者将坡印廷定理推广以纳入磁偶极矩在非均匀磁场中的相互作用能，并相应扩展麦克斯韦方程组以考虑磁偶极矩源。研究表明，基于扩展坡印廷定理的表述与常规量子电动力学表述可给出一致结果，且两种方法均仅用电磁场而无需势函数来表达相互作用。研究聚焦于磁偶极相互作用，不涉及磁单极子。

item.title: 磁极化子实现异常磁热响应
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Joshua Ancheta, Caeli Benyacko, Fanghao Zhang, Stephen D. Wilson, Bolin Liao
该研究表明磁极化子为克服磁熵与场响应性之间的典型权衡提供了中间 regime，从而实现异常磁热响应。以EuB₆为模型体系，结合热力学与磁性测量，证明居里温度附近出现的纳米尺度铁磁团簇强烈增强场诱导熵坍缩。这些团簇具有大有效磁矩，能高效响应外场，同时因尺寸小和动态涨落保持可观熵。EuB₆在10-40 K技术重要温区展现出巨大低温磁热响应，具有大的等温熵变和绝热温变。

item.title: Mo₂C纳米片中场奇与零场超导二极管效应的观测
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Wei Gao, Kaixuan Fan, Menghan Li, Jinhao Cheng, Qing Zhang, Shuaishuai Ding, Wenping Hu, Fan Yang, Dechao Geng, Hechen Ren
该研究在化学气相沉积生长的传统中心对称材料Mo₂C纳米片中发现超导二极管效应(SDE)，独特地同时存在场奇SDE与零场SDE。场奇SDE在4 K垂直面内磁场下效率超40%且可调；另一样品中零场SDE在零场与场冷条件下持续存在。面外场扫描证实其内禀性，提出畴壁超电流或电荷密度波序驱动该意外对称性破缺组合，为液氦温度非互易超导电子学提供了空气稳定平台。

item.title: CrSBr中可重构层状磁畴结构的光学读出
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Aleksandra Łopion, Pierre-Maurice Piel, Thomas Kliewer, Manuel Terbeck, Jan-Hendrik Larusch, Jakob Henz, Marie-Christin Heißenbüttel, Kseniia Mosina, Thorsten Deilmann, Michael Rohlfing, Zdenek Sofer, Ursula Wurstbauer
范德华磁性半导体CrSBr具有多稳态磁序与强光-物质耦合特性，本工作通过磁反射光谱结合光学多层模型，实现了对层状磁构型的纯光学、非破坏、非接触式读出。外加磁场及与反铁磁体MnPS₃的界面工程可系统调控磁态的多重性与稳定性，其磁构型依赖层厚并呈现级联式中间态，为基于磁组态的信息编码与处理提供了兼容现代光电子技术的读出机制。

item.title: 观点：磁性赛道上的量子计算
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Ji Zou, Jelena Klinovaja, Daniel Loss
该观点文章论述了磁畴壁作为量子计算平台的潜力，强调其高迁移率使其既可作静态量子比特也可作飞行量子比特。文章概述了基于磁畴壁实现通用量子计算的关键要素与材料要求，讨论了具体候选材料平台、尚需完成的实验验证，以及该交叉领域面临的挑战与新机遇。

item.title: 光离子钟中固有时量子效应的探测
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Gabriel Sorci, Joshua Foo, Dietrich Leibfried, Christian Sanner, Igor Pikovski
本文证明原子钟可探测经典固有时动力学描述不足够的效应。作者应用哈密顿形式论推导谐波囚禁钟原子中的时间膨胀效应，揭示由真空能量、压缩和量子动力学修正引起的二阶多普勒频移（vSODS、sqSODS、qSODS）。研究表明，当原子运动被强压缩时，运动与钟演化之间的纠缠可在最先进的钟中变得可观测，实现固有时干涉测量。该结果显示囚禁离子钟实验已接近探测需量子描述固有时演化的相对论效应。

item.title: 应变与激光-静电势垒下有能隙石墨烯的量子输运
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Hasna Chnafa, Clarence Cortes, David Laroze, Ahmed Jellal
该研究采用转移矩阵方法研究含能隙、标量势及单轴锯齿应变的石墨烯在激光调制势垒下的电子输运。无应变时提高能隙或势垒降低中心/低边带透射；中等锯齿应变产生Fano型振荡，大应变下消失。上边带中入射能使共振峰右移，势垒宽度增加产生特征振荡。激光场振幅增强透射而高频抑制之，为光电子器件调控提供新途径。

item.title: 自旋-轨道耦合诱导的量子手性相
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Daesik Kim, Hyojae Jeon, Seongjun Park, Seungho Lee, Jung Hoon Han, Hyun-Yong Lee
该工作证明在具有XXZ相互作用、自旋-轨道诱导交换相互作用和外磁场的自旋-1/2三角晶格模型中，存在标量自旋手性对称性允许但经典因共线或共面自旋排列而为零、由量子涨落产生的量子手性相。使用无限矩阵乘积态密度矩阵重正化群方法全面绘制相图，识别出多个磁性序与标量自旋手性共存的相。详细磁子分析将非零手性归因于量子涨落，拓展了量子手性磁性的探索空间。

item.title: Performance Optimisation and Practical Implementation of 400 Gbps Dual-Polarisation QPSK Optical Backhaul Systems for 5G and Beyond Mobile Networks
item.description:
📚 Preprints
👤 Francis Padi, Solomon Nunoo, John Kodjo Annan
The exponential growth in mobile data traffic necessitates revolutionary approaches in optical backhaul technology. This paper introduces a transformative 400G Dual-Polarisation QPSK optical backhaul system that fundamentally advances coherent optical communications through a novel hybrid machine-learning-physical-modelling framework. Our architecture achieves breakthrough performance by operating within 0.8 dB of quantum limits using commercial components while reducing computational complexity by 40% compared to conventional digital backpropagation. The design incorporates multi-timescale polarisation tracking with cross-timescale correlation modelling, demonstrating a 60% reduction in polarisation-dependent penalties. Furthermore, we implement intelligent resource-aware processing that…

item.title: 面向定量金相学中可靠晶界分析的上下文感知学习
item.description:
📚 Preprints
👤 Boaz Meivar, Inbal Cohen, Matan Rusanovsky, Francis Quintal Lauzon, Julien Robitaille, Ofer Be'eri 等8位作者
该工作研究了上下文、监督方式和图像表征如何共同影响晶界检测保真度。上下文消融实验表明去除全局上下文会显著降低边界可识别性，证实上下文是可靠界面检测的首要条件。据此提出MLOGRAPHY++方法，采用保留上下文的局部标签策略以减少对繁重后处理的依赖。进一步测试表明，在固定提示的受控扩散超分辨率下，Heyn晶粒尺寸误差从9.98 px降至5.38 px。

item.title: Stochastic Yet Precise: Memristor Crossbar Arrays Enabling Robust In‐Memory Computing, Hardware Security, and Generative Adversarial Network
item.description:
📚 Wiley
👤 Hyesung Na, Jung Soo Kim, Gimun Kim, Jaewoo Choi, Kang Ryoung Park, Sungjun Kim
Advanced Functional Materials, Volume 36, Issue 31, 16 April 2026.

item.title: Tackling multiphysics problems via finite element-guided physics-informed operator learning
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Yusuke Yamazaki, Reza Najian Asl, Markus Apel, Mayu Muramatsu, Shahed Rezaei
arXiv:2603.01420v3 Announce Type: replace Abstract: This work presents a finite element-guided physics-informed operator learning framework for multiphysics problems with coupled partial differential equations (PDEs) on arbitrary domains. The proposed framework learns an operator from the input space to the solution space with a weighted residual formulation based on the finite element method, enabling discretization-independent prediction beyond the training resolution without relying on labeled simulation data. The present framework for multiphysics problems is implemented in Folax, a JAX-based operator learning platform, and is verified on nonlinear coupled thermo-mechanical problems. Two- and three-dimensional representative volume elements with varying heterogeneous microstructures,…
